storyHook: 列清单买面包牛奶，付款回家

narrative.when: 傍晚六点，下班回家顺路
narrative.method: 拿面包牛奶、看价格、付钱装袋、回家放进厨房
narrative.event: 甲发现家里面包牛奶都断了，晚饭要做三明治

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I need to get bread and milk for tonight.
turns.zh: 我得去买面包和牛奶，晚上用。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Evening. What are you after?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Just bread and milk. And butter if you have it.
turns.zh: 就面包和牛奶，有黄油的话也来点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. The milk is over there, cold place.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it. Let me get a brown bread.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good one. It came in today.
turns.zh: 选得好。那条是今天新到的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And a small box of butter, please.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here you go. Any more?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that's all. How much?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is twenty five and eight.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Here is thirty. Keep the change.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: rest up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will make the food now.
turns.zh: 好的。我现在就去做吃的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sounds good. alright then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: okay. Thanks again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Have a rest up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. The bread is soft today.
turns.zh: 你也是。今天面包挺软的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, got here this afternoon. Good for bread bits.
turns.zh: 对，下午刚到的。做面包块正好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put butter on it. That makes it better.
turns.zh: 我打算抹点黄油，味道更好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Butter is a good idea. I keep it near the milk.
turns.zh: 黄油是好主意。我把它放在牛奶旁边。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I saw it. I took one box.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. You have everything now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, milk, bread, butter. That is all.
turns.zh: 嗯，牛奶、面包、黄油。就这些了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quick go. You will have food in a short time.
turns.zh: 跑一趟很快。你马上就能吃上了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, two minutes back. Thanks again.
turns.zh: 对，两分钟就回去。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let me get the price for you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Milk, bread, butter... that's twenty-five eight.
turns.zh: 牛奶、面包、黄油……一共二十五块八。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is thirty. Keep the change.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, that is kind. Are you certain?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it's a small thing. You were quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well then, let me put them in your bag.
turns.zh: 那好，我帮你装进袋子里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. I'll be off now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Have a rest up. Take your time with the food.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. okay again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: sure. Come back when you like.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right then, let me get the bread and milk first.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The bread is on that shelf over there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see it. This one looks good.
turns.zh: 看到了，这个看起来挺好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. The milk is with the cold food.
turns.zh: 选得好。牛奶在冷食那边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I'll take a bottle. That's enough for tonight.
turns.zh: 好，我拿一瓶。今晚够用了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let us get some butter as well?
turns.zh: 好的，要不要再来点黄油？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. It goes well with the bread.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here it is. Not too dear.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I'll take this box.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is all then?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, just the three things.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let me ring them up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you take notes or card?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Notes, please. Here's thirty.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And your change is four two. Have a good meal.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. I'll put them in my bag.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. It keeps us from using more bags.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Well, I had better get back.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Off to make some bread with bits?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, with meat and green bits.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have a good meal.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: sure. okay again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure. be safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. The door is shut.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Got it. rest up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now, the bread and milk are done.
turns.zh: 好了，面包和牛奶都拿了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have butter as well?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, over there, second shelf.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will get one box.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That butter is good for bread between.
turns.zh: 那黄油做面包夹心不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite. And the price is right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me put them on the table?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, please. Let me see the full number.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Twenty five eight for all.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, here is thirty. Keep the change.
turns.zh: 这是三十块，零钱你留着吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will put them in my bag.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. No need for a bag then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have it here. Thanks for the help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. Have a rest up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am off to make the evening meal.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is for our meal tonight?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Bread with milk and butter.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sounds quick and good. Have a good time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. okay after.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: okay. be safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get some butter too. It goes well with the bread.
turns.zh: 我再拿盒黄油，配面包正好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good eye. That butter is on offer this week.
turns.zh: 好眼光，这黄油这周特价。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, is it? Then I will take two.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two? That is a great amount for one person.
turns.zh: 两盒？一个人吃这么多啊？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not a great meal. Only butter for the week.
turns.zh: 哪算大餐，一周的黄油罢了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. Any more before I take the money?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. Just the milk, bread and butter.
turns.zh: 没了，就牛奶、面包和黄油。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. That comes to thirty eight fifty.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is a fifty. Keep the change.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is kind of you. Have a good evening.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. You too.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: May I put them in your bag?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, please. That would be great.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here you go. All done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. I will be off then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: alright then. Have a good meal.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will do. sure.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: alright then. I hope the bread is soft.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It came this morning. You will like it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will put meat and greens between bread.
turns.zh: 那就好，我打算在面包里夹肉和青菜。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds like a good meal. Quick and simple.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I have some meat in the fridge.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then that is all. Have a rest up.
turns.zh: 那全齐了，晚上好好享用。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. I will go back now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: be safe. I will leave, I hope.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite so. I come here almost every day.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will keep the bread soft for you.
turns.zh: 行，那我给你留着软面包。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take a warm plate with meat and greens.
turns.zh: 我打算把肉和青菜热一热吃。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good idea. Have a good meal.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Good night, and see you tomorrow.

storyBlurb: 下班回家，甲发现冰箱里牛奶面包空空如也。顺路去楼下便利店，快速采购，回家做三明治。
storyScript:
【开场·列清单出门】傍晚六点，天色渐暗，甲推开家门，放下公文包，习惯性地打开冰箱。牛奶盒轻飘飘的，面包袋里只剩一片干硬的面包边。他皱了皱眉，想起今晚打算做三明治当晚餐，可食材全断了。他掏出手机，在备忘录里快速记下：牛奶、面包。然后抓起门口的购物袋，转身下楼。电梯里，他盘算着便利店就在小区门口，来回不过十分钟，正好赶在晚饭前搞定。

【进行·选购商品】便利店灯火通明，自动门叮咚一声打开。甲径直走向冷藏柜，熟练地拿起一升装鲜牛奶，又转到面包货架，挑了一条全麦吐司。他瞥了一眼价签，心里默算着今天的开销，确认价格合理后，把牛奶和面包轻轻放进自带的购物袋里。店里没有其他顾客，只有收银台后的乙在低头整理零钱。甲走到冷柜前，又顺手拿了一盒黄油，想着三明治里加片黄油会更香。

【进行·付款离开】甲把商品放在收银台上，乙抬起头，微笑着扫过条码。嘀嘀两声，乙报出总价：“二十五块八。”甲从钱包里抽出一张纸币递过去，乙找零时顺手递上一个塑料袋，甲摆摆手，指了指自己的购物袋。乙会意，帮他把牛奶和面包小心装进袋中。甲接过袋子，道了声谢，转身走出便利店。晚风拂面，他拎着袋子，脚步轻快。

【收束·回家放好】推开家门，甲直接走进厨房，把购物袋放在台面上。他取出牛奶，放进冰箱冷藏层，又拿出面包和黄油，放在案板上。冰箱里还有火腿和生菜，正好搭配。他满意地关上冰箱门，哼着小调开始准备晚餐。窗外华灯初上，厨房里暖黄的灯光映着简单的食材，一切刚刚好。
